title: campanula orbelica
intro: Campanula orbelica, also known as the Balkan bellflower, is a perennial plant species native to the Balkan Peninsula. Traditionally, Campanula orbelica has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Campanula orbelica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to support overall well-being.
